name: CloudAPI Pro
product: Unified API gateway and management platform for developers
pricing_tier: Freemium: 10k req/month free; Pro $299/mo; Enterprise custom
value_proposition: Deploy production-ready APIs in minutes with built-in authentication, rate limiting, and analytics — without managing infrastructure

competitors.name: Kong
competitors.weakness: Complex setup requiring DevOps expertise; steep learning curve

competitors.name: Postman API Platform
competitors.weakness: Primarily testing-focused; limited runtime gateway capabilities

competitors.name: AWS API Gateway
competitors.weakness: Vendor lock-in; complex pricing; requires AWS ecosystem knowledge

target.segment: Series A-C SaaS startups and mid-market digital teams
pain_points: API infrastructure takes weeks to set up
Authentication and rate limiting are error-prone to build in-house
Lack of visibility into API usage and errors
Scaling API infrastructure under load is stressful

differentiators: Native integration with 50+ frameworks and languages
Polish-based support with EU data residency
Transparent, predictable pricing — no surprise bills

case_studies.result: Reduced API deployment time from 3 weeks to 2 hours
Passed SOC 2 audit in 4 weeks using built-in compliance features
99.99% API uptime during Black Friday with auto-scaling
